regulations.title: Portuguese Carbon Tax on Industrial Emissions
regulations.summary: EUR 42.98/tCO2e; Lisbon Juices ~1,850 tCO2e/year estimated = EUR 79,500 liability; APA registration required.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Multi-format packaging portfolio (glass, PET, aseptic carton) audit required; EPR surcharge exposure varies by format.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: FY2025 first reporting year; BDO Portugal CSRD scoping initiated; sustainability statement due June 2026.
